title: Modifier editing — BUG 3 regression: 'remove X on the burger' must NOT delete the burger
notes: Regression for BUG 3. Cart has Burger + Extra Cheese. Customer says 'remove the extra cheese on the Loaded Smash Burger'. The _is_reference_not_target guard recognises the burger as a reference (preceded by 'on the'), so DET_A2 does NOT remove it. Instead DET_B2 detects Extra Cheese as the paid add-on target and removes it. Burger survives.

turns.message: Loaded Smash Burger with extra cheese

llm.message: Loaded Smash Burger with Extra Cheese — R85.00 ✅

turns.message: Remove the extra cheese on the Loaded Smash Burger
